common.network_error: Network error. Make sure Django is running.
common.error_msg: Prediction failed. Please check your inputs.

home.hero_desc: Empowering Indian farmers with cutting-edge AI for crop selection, nutrient management, and plant health.

how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.subtitle: Three simple steps to smarter farming
how_it_works.step1_desc: Enter soil parameters or upload a plant image
how_it_works.step2_desc: Our ML models process your inputs instantly
how_it_works.step3_desc: Receive actionable recommendations to act on

crop.title: Crop Recommendation
crop.desc: Enter your soil and climate data to get an AI-powered crop suggestion.
crop.result_desc: Our AI has analyzed your conditions and identified these top choices for your farm.

fert.title: Fertilizer Recommendation
fert.desc: Enter soil nutrient levels and soil type to receive a targeted fertilizer suggestion.
fert.result_desc: These fertilizers are recommended to optimize your soil's nutrient balance.

disease.title: Plant Disease Detection
disease.desc: Upload a clear photo of your plant and let our deep learning model identify the disease.
disease.symptoms_placeholder: Describe visible symptoms — yellowing, spots, wilting...
disease.prevention_hint: Consult an agricultural specialist for prevention advice.

auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue
auth.reg_subtitle: It's free and only takes a minute
